commit_scope: Move the home living-lineage presences out of hardcoded page data and into presence-walk data with visible trace links and source-backed public images.

commands: cd web && npm test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts (first pass found missing fresh-worktree dependency: vitest)
cd web && npm run build (first pass found a TypeScript narrowing issue in web/lib/home-presence-traces.ts)
for f in web/messages/*.json web/content/presence-walk/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
THREAD_RUNTIME_START_SERVERS=1 ./scripts/verify_worktree_local_web.sh (rerun after transient local API timing failure)
local_validation.summary: The homepage now gets living-lineage cards from getHomePresenceTraceCards(), which projects presence-walk JSON nodes plus homePresence trace entries. The page remains force-dynamic for fresh rendering, but the people shown, images, metrics, trace links, and trace sources now come from data. The focused guard verifies absence of FEATURED_PRESENCES, presence data coverage, trace href/source coverage, and existing local public images. The shared local verifier passed on rerun with zero API matrix failures and all web route checks passing; worktree_pr_guard then reported ready_for_push=True.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR checks, and merge verification.

deploy_validation.details: Public web verification will be performed after merge and deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The home page still renders dynamically, but the living-lineage section is no longer a fixed local array. Each card is backed by presence-walk data and exposes how the relation is traced through field-story API paths or lived profile traces.
test_flows: home page imports getHomePresenceTraceCards and maps homePresenceCards instead of FEATURED_PRESENCES
presence-walk data contains five home presences, trace labels, trace hrefs, metrics, sources, and trace explanations
local public images exist for Liquid Bloom, Bloomurian, Mose, Matias De Stefano, and PORTAL
Next build marks / as dynamic and completes type checking

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; commit, push, PR, checks, merge, and public verification remain pending.
